panels.description: Wide shot: Mowgli stands in a dusty village clearing, stones and primitive bullets kicking up dirt around his feet. He looks bewildered and defensive, muscles tensed. Golden hour lighting casting long, dramatic shadows.

bubbles.text: Now what is this? It is in my head that, if bullets mean anything, they would cast thee out.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Mowgli and Akela standing back-to-back. Akela is growling at the unseen villagers. In the background, blurry figures of angry villagers are shouting.

bubbles.text: It is in my head that... they would cast thee out.

panels.description: Medium shot: Mowgli gently pushing Messua away from the line of fire. His expression is firm and protective. Messua looks frightened but hesitant.

bubbles.text: Run back, Messua. This is one of the foolish tales they tell under the big tree.

panels.description: Close-up: Mowgli's face, cold and resolute. He is turning his back on the village. A slight smirk, holding Shere Khan's skin over his shoulder.

bubbles.text: Keep count, for I will do your herding no more. Let us get away.

panels.description: Wide shot: Mowgli and the wolves silhouetted against a massive, milky full moon, walking away into the vast plains. High contrast, cinematic composition.

bubbles.text: When the moon rose, they saw Mowgli... trotting across at the steady wolf's trot that eats up the miles like fire.
